title: orthosiphon suffrutescens
intro: Orthosiphon suffrutescens is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as a type of mint. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Orthosiphon suffrutescens include its ability to help reduce urine retention, alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, and lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
